comments.body:
Hello Noaman,

Good day!

A quick update on the REST API registration, we attempted to register the account today as well. However, the registration has been failing.

We will try reaching out to FedEx from our end and update you on the status. In the meantime, if possible please also check with your FedEx Account representative and request the to share the exact Billing Address that can be used for Rest API registration for your account 695996870.

Let us know if you hear from them.

Best regards,
Keerthi
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

comments.body:
L3 - Discussed with Keerthi

The customer has choosen $19 plan and have added two carrier accounts (FedEx SOAP and DHL Express) and now when they are trying to add the FedEx account again through Rest API, they could not proceed as the current plan support only two carrier accounts.

It is not advisable to remove an existing account as we are not sure if the new account works.

So, please provide another carrier account option for this plan for the below mentioned store. Let us know once done.

Store URL - thedeensquare.myshopify.com
App - Shopify MCSL
Account ID - 86bbe92e-202f-4684-b357-9b7c7b66e436

comments.body:
Moving back to L3 -

Rest API migration is completed in the store

When going through the Carrier Settings -> Other Details, the option "Add Buffer Days to Estimated Delivery(upto 10 days)" is not available in the new Rest API integration but available in the old SOPA integration.

Could you check and enable this feature in the new Rest API as well and let us know once done.

FYI, Keerthi has already informed this to the dev.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/iAvzfIH2JQOUYyRcpxai6M7ut/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/pgVKg5DJj0KZstrPYRTSCpqNG/?name=image.png)

comments.body:
Hello Noaman,

Good day!

Upon checking the reason for the Rest API registration failure, we could see that the app is subscribed in your store for the $19 Starter plan that support integration of only two carrier accounts. Currently, there is already a FedEx account and an Aramex account integrated in the app and due to this the new registration was failing.

Considering the requirement, we have provided an additional account integration option for the existing plan for your store. Once done, we were able to successfully add the FedEx account through Rest API.

Once added, we have updated the carrier settings in the same way as it was in the old account. One feature "Add Buffer Days to Estimated Delivery(upto 10 days)" which you are using in the old account is currently not available in the new Rest API account. No need to worry, we have informed this to our team to enable this feature for your store and we will keep you posted on the updates once completed.

To check the working of the new account registration, i have added a product to the cart and checked the rates for a US address and the rates from the new account integration are shown at the checkout. Please check from your end once and confirm.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/XAzXpURINLwAZtIioFSyhEuFD/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

To check the working of the new account registration, i have added a product to the cart and checked the rates for a US address and the rates from the new account integration are shown at the checkout. Please check from your end once and confirm.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Noaman,

Good day!

Upon checking the reason for the Rest API registration failure, we could see that the app is subscribed in your store for the $19 Starter plan that support integration of only two carrier accounts. Currently, there is already a FedEx account and an Aramex account integrated in the app and due to this the new registration was failing.

Considering the requirement, we have provided an additional account integration option for the existing plan for your store. Once done, we were able to successfully add the FedEx account through Rest API.

Once added, we have updated the carrier settings in the same way as it was in the old account. One feature "Add Buffer Days to Estimated Delivery(upto 10 days)" which you are using in the old account is currently not available in the new Rest API account. No need to worry, we have informed this to our team and it will available in the new integration in 2-3 weeks. Will let you know of the updates.

To check the working of the new account registration, i have added a product to the cart and checked the rates for a US address and the rates from the new account integration are shown at the checkout. Please check from your end once and confirm.

Once done, i have disabled the Rate Automation Rule named "Auto Rule For FedEx Rest" (as shown in screenshot 2 below). Once you are ready in using the new Rest API account, please enable it.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/XAzXpURINLwAZtIioFSyhEuFD/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/EqFXy0HMaLnFJeLsvVO5nfbCI/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Noaman,
 
Good day!
 
Upon checking the reason for the Rest API registration failure, we could see that the app is subscribed in your store for the $19 Starter plan that support integration of only two carrier accounts. Currently, there is already a FedEx account and an Aramex account integrated in the app and due to this the new registration was failing. 
 
Considering the requirement, we have provided an additional account integration option for the existing plan for your store. Once done, we were able to successfully add the FedEx account through Rest API. 
 
Once added, we have updated the carrier settings in the same way as it was in the old account. One feature "Add Buffer Days to Estimated Delivery(upto 10 days)" which you are using in the old account is currently not available in the new Rest API account. No need to worry, we have informed this to our team and it will available in the new integration in 2-3 weeks. Will let you know of the updates.
 
To check the working of the new account registration, i have added a product to the cart and checked the rates for a US address and the rates from the new account integration are shown at the checkout. Please check from your end once and confirm.
 
Once done, i have disabled the Rate Automation Rule named "Auto Rule For FedEx Rest" (as shown in screenshot 2 below). Once you are ready in using the new Rest API account, please enable it. 
 

 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
